[Calling write_report(title="Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary", content="## Latest dosing parameters
**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28  
**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

### Patient summary
| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

### Quick take
- All three compassionate-use patients have active dosing schedules populated.
- Two patients are on **q3w** dosing; one new enrollee is on **q2w** dosing.
- Clinical notes are overall encouraging, with no issues flagged in the dosing file itself.

### Note on PK stability
Based on the dosing file alone, there are **no obvious red flags** in the listed patient-specific PK clearance values or schedules. However, confirmation of model stability requires checking the monitoring configuration and/or recent model health outputs.", recipients="")]
